author: y4rr
content: Phase 2.2 dispatch start: 7 reduction forwards (sum/sum_dim/mean/mean_dim/prod/amax/amin) + 5 cumulative (cumsum/cumprod/cummax/cummin/logcumsumexp) + edge cases. Approach: regen reduction.json fixtures via WSL python3 torch 2.11.0+cu130, author conformance_reduction.rs mirroring conformance_elementwise.rs structure (CPU/GPU/autograd lanes, F64_REDUCTION_GPU 1e-9 abs, F32_REDUCTION_GPU 1e-5 abs), rewrite Cat C/D exclusion reasons in _surface_exclusions.toml to implicit-coverage framing, file cascade issues for any new failures (prod backward GPU stub, logcumsumexp poly cluster, amax/amin tie divergence, cumprod-zero, empty-tensor parity).
